author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Design: new module crosslink/src/hub_source.rs with trait HubSource { agent_ids(), read_events(agent_id, after: Option<&OrderingKey>), read_checkpoint(), read_legacy_watermark(), allowed_signers_file() -> Option<PathBuf> }. Two impls: WorktreeSource (wraps cache_dir, byte-for-byte current read behavior) and ObjectStoreSource (repo dir + refname, reads committed tree via git ls-tree/cat-file with NO checkout; extracts allowed_signers blob to an owned TempDir because verify_event_signature shells to ssh-keygen with a path). Pure reduction extracted from compact() as reduce(&dyn HubSource) -> ReductionOutcome { state, changed_issues, changed_locks, events_processed }, including the watermark-none full-reset and empty-events early-return semantics. compact() becomes reduce(WorktreeSource) + unchanged write side (materialize, skew detection, write_checkpoint). events.rs gains from-bytes parse variants; path versions become wrappers. Parity test: populate hub layout in temp git repo, commit to branch, run reduce via both sources, assert identical CheckpointState via serde equality across scenarios (multi-agent, lock contention, incremental with watermark, full compaction).
